query:
SELECT 
  id,
  executionType,
  status,
  itemsScraped,
  newItems,
  errorMessage,
  createdAt,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, createdAt, NOW()) as minutes_running
FROM scrapingLogs
WHERE status = 'running'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
